## Case ID

Paste the case ID.

## Objection Type

Choose one:

- weak mapping
- forced analogy
- wrong structural_error verdict
- missing critical dependency
- dependency not actually critical
- better existing framework
- unclear valid scope

## Explanation

Describe the objection.

## Proposed Revision

Suggest how the case should be corrected, narrowed, or removed.
